findings.title: Unpinned third-party GitHub Actions in publish workflow
findings.description: actions/checkout@v4 and astral-sh/setup-uv@v5 use mutable version tags instead of immutable commit SHAs
findings.exploit_scenario: Attacker compromises the action repo, pushes malicious code under the existing tag; next publish CI run executes attacker code with id-token:write permissions
findings.impact: PyPI supply chain compromise — attacker can publish malicious package versions
findings.recommendation: Pin to full commit SHA for both actions
